changes: Disembowel: Duration has been increased from 24 to 30 seconds.
Art of War: MP cost reduced from 800 to 600.
Gravity: MP cost reduced from 700 to 600.
Standard Finish: Potency reduced from 400 to 300.
Single Standard Finish: Potency reduced from 800 to 600.
Double Standard Finish: Potency reduced from 1,200 to 900.
Technical Finish: Potency reduced from 400 to 300.
Single Technical Finish: Potency reduced from 800 to 600.
Double Technical Finish: Potency reduced from 1,200 to 900.
Triple Technical Finish: Potency reduced from 1,600 to 1,200.
Quadruple Technical Finish: Potency reduced from 2,000 to 1,500.
Terminal Velocity: Potency reduced from 7,500 to 6,000.

new_content.name: Eden's Gate
new_content.description: A new raid dungeon consisting of tokens traded for gear; requires completion of Chronicles of a New Era quests.

new_content.name: Eden's Gate: Resurrection
new_content.description: Duty added to Duty Roulette: Mentor and Duty Roulette: Normal Raids.

new_content.name: Eden's Gate: Descent
new_content.description: Duty added to Duty Roulette: Mentor and Duty Roulette: Normal Raids.

new_content.name: Eden's Gate: Inundation
new_content.description: Duty added to Duty Roulette: Mentor and Duty Roulette: Normal Raids.

new_content.name: Eden's Gate: Sepulture
new_content.description: Duty added to Duty Roulette: Mentor and Duty Roulette: Normal Raids; provides a blade of early antiquity as a completion reward.

new_content.name: In the Middle of Nowhere
new_content.description: Chronicles of a New Era quest.

new_content.name: Deploy the Core
new_content.description: Chronicles of a New Era quest.

new_content.name: Duty Roulette: Mentor
new_content.description: System updated with new duties and increased item level requirements.

new_content.name: Duty Roulette: Normal Raids
new_content.description: System updated to include Eden's Gate duties.

new_content.name: The Empty
new_content.description: Exploration zone where Eden's Gate is located.

housing.name: Force Your Way Orchestrion Roll
housing.description: Music roll for Force Your Way. Use to add to your orchestrion list.

housing.name: Blinding Indigo Orchestrion Roll
housing.description: Music roll for Blinding Indigo. Use to add to your orchestrion list.

housing.name: Landslide Orchestrion Roll
housing.description: Music roll for Landslide. Use to add to your orchestrion list.

glamour.name: Helm of Early Antiquity
glamour.description: A winged helmet forged by some ancient civilization, recovered from Eden's Gate. Two helms can be traded for special headgear.

glamour.name: Armor of Early Antiquity
glamour.description: Emblazoned armor forged by some ancient civilization, recovered from Eden's Gate. Four suits can be traded for special body gear.

glamour.name: Gauntlets of Early Antiquity
glamour.description: Wrought-iron gauntlets forged by some ancient civilization, recovered from Eden's Gate. Two pairs can be traded for special arm gear.

glamour.name: Chausses of Early Antiquity
glamour.description: Heavy chausses forged by some ancient civilization, recovered from Eden's Gate. Four pairs can be traded for special leg gear.

glamour.name: Greaves of Early Antiquity
glamour.description: Tarnished greaves forged by some ancient civilization, recovered from Eden's Gate. Two pairs can be traded for special foot gear.

glamour.name: Belt of Early Antiquity
glamour.description: An ornamented belt created by some ancient civilization, recovered from Eden's Gate. One belt can be traded for special waist gear.

glamour.name: Bangle of Early Antiquity
glamour.description: An extravagant bangle forged by some ancient civilization, recovered from Eden's Gate. One bangle can be traded for a special accessory.
